title: KingArt Soft Grip Gel Pen Set 30/Pkg-Assorted Colors
features: SPARKLE - 30 glitter colors cover the rainbow and add that extra sparkle to any project. Soft grip area for a comfortable, secure hold.
WRITE ON & ON - Enjoy hours of creativity as each pen will write about 80 meters or more. Acid Free and Non-Toxic ink, our gel pen sets are perfect for artists of all ages.

ROLLERBALL PRECISION - Designed to ensure a smooth writing experience. No sputtering ink or skipped lines our smooth, fine point rollerball nib will glide over your pages effortlessly for a perfect finish.

MULTI-USE - Gel pens can add dazzle to artistic and everyday activities. A great choice for school and home projects, letter writing, coloring books, scrapbooking, greeting cards, creating mandalas or just doodling to add rich color and texture to your designs.

LEADER IN ART MATERIALS - KINGART is owned by a 3rd generation art materials family and proud of our rich heritage in bringing quality supplies to artists and craftsmen throughout the world. We delight in challenging the status quo and putting our experience to work for you because Art is for Everyone!
description: Let your creativity sparkle and shine! You’ll be amazed and delighted by what you can do with this set of 30 soft grip glitter gel pens. Create your own intricate mandalas, rich with color and texture… enjoy hours of coloring fun courtesy of our gel pens’ luxurious comfort grip and extra-large ink cartridges… bring brilliance to drawings on dark paper… and enthrall young artists with neon and glitter pens that are acid free and non-toxic. We Focus on Precision and Consistency for a Smooth Experience. Unlike other gel pen brands, our focus is on quality and experience. No sputtering ink or skipped lines. Our smooth, fine point rollerball nib will glide over the pages effortlessly for a perfect finish. And with 50% more ink than other brands, the creative possibilities are endless. Gel pen tips remains the same size unlike a crayon or colored pencil that changes shape as you color. This means you have a lot of control over what your coloring art looks like. With quality pens in hand, the possibilities are endless. Dive into creating and coloring an intricate mandala, create stunning invitations and greeting cards, write a warm heartfelt letter to friends and family, add outstanding color to your scrapbooks, write a quick not on a post-it. Whatever you decide to use our glitter gel pens for, we know you will love the look, feel, and glamour of that sparkly sheen. Designed by artists, each gel pen is manufactured to exacting standards, so you’re assured of quality and consistency. Light up your art and your imagination.
